name: Backup
description: Backup your data to a custom location. Ensure the safety and availability of your important files by creating regular backups.

USE_BACKUP.help: Enable or disable the backup feature
USE_BACKUP.label: Activate automatic backup

BACKUP_SCHEDULE.help: The frequency of the backup. 'hanoi' runs hourly and applies Towers of Hanoi rotation (24 files, ~85 days coverage).
BACKUP_SCHEDULE.label: Backup schedule

BACKUP_ROTATION.help: The number of backups to keep
BACKUP_ROTATION.label: Backup rotation

BACKUP_DIRECTORY.help: The directory where the backup will be stored
BACKUP_DIRECTORY.label: Backup directory

BACKUP_IGNORE_CHECKSUM_ERROR_ON_DB_RESTO.help: If set to 'yes', a failed SHA-256 checksum verification will not abort the restore. Use only as a last resort when the backup file is partially corrupted but you still need to recover data.
BACKUP_IGNORE_CHECKSUM_ERROR_ON_DB_RESTO.label: Ignore checksum error on restore
